body:
## Summary
- Add Search e2e coverage proving question provenance badges reveal and hide localized source notes via pointer and keyboard activation in Swedish and English.
- Wire the existing Search route query-hydration focus flag in `scripts/validate-content.js` so the focused Search parity test runs directly instead of falling through to the full validator.

## Validation
- `prettier --check tests/e2e/search-accessibility.spec.ts scripts/validate-content.js`
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-search-route-query-hydration`
- `node --test tests/content-search-route-copy-parity.test.js tests/content-question-card-accessibility-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'ProvenanceBadge|source note|Search route'`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run test:a11y-labels`
- `npm run test:theme-discipline`
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/search-query-hydration.spec.ts tests/e2e/search-accessibility.spec.ts --workers=1 -g 'provenance|source note|Search'`
- `git diff --check`
title: test search provenance source note disclosure
